note: Honest coverage frontier for the operator console. status: present = a runnable step drives real frontend code and passes; pending = specified panel behavior whose implementation (frontend/ React console) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed UI). The console is scaffolded (frontend/) with vitest oracles; each scenario names its passing vitest test, run by the frontend CI job.

scenarios.name: The console builds its API layer only from the generated OpenAPI client
A dropped SSE stream shows a disconnected indicator and reconnects
Interactive console components conform to WAI-ARIA
The console never enforces a safety decision client-side
An API error renders the restrictive state
In read-only mode the console exposes no mutating control
When mutation is enabled an authorized operator gains operational controls
The approval console shows the plan, prediction, and reversibility signals for a pending decision
An approver action is gated by role and re-checked server-side
A non-approver cannot act on a pending decision
The ActionManifest timeline renders one chain keyed by the action id
Replaying a completed manifest reconstructs the chain without re-executing
The ledger view surfaces the server-computed chain verification status
A broken ledger chain is shown as tamper-detected
The explainability panel shows the banding signals, execution class, and tool-result evidence
Autonomy-band and kill-switch controls call the policy API and are RBAC-gated
A kill-switch reflects the disabled state only after the API confirms it
The admin panel manages users, roles, on-call, and modules
